dataSource.title: Data source
dataSource.subtitle: SQL schema or external JDBC connector for reports, migrations, bindings, and script functions
dataSource.sqlHint: Run a single read (SELECT, WITH, …) or write (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DDL) statement against this data source.
migration.title: Migration
migration.pending: Pending apply (SQL changed or not yet executed)
migration.applyConfirm: Apply SQL migration to target schema?
sqlBinding.title: SQL binding
sqlBinding.subtitle: SELECT → object variable
schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Invoke a platform function on a fixed interval (intervalMs)
sqlObject.title: SQL object
sqlObject.dataSourceDesc: Reference to PostgreSQL schema for reports, migrations, and bindings.
sqlObject.migrationDesc: DDL/DML script applied to data source schema.
sqlObject.bindingDesc: Sync SELECT result to object variable.
sqlObject.scheduleDesc: Invoke a platform function on intervalMs; runtime status in lastTickAt / lastError.
hint.openInEditorWorkspace: Editor opens in a workspace tab. Double-click a tree node for the same effect.
application.explorerSubtitle: Install, deploy bundles, and manage application lifecycle.
packageImport.title: Package import
packageImport.subtitle: Load a bundle into the object tree: data source, migrations, reports, functions, bindings, and schedules. API: POST /api/v1/platform/packages/import.
deploy.title: Bundle deploy
deploy.subtitle: Bundle version history and rollback. Deploy via POST /api/v1/applications/{{appId}}/deploy.
deploy.historyHint: Previous bundle versions. Roll back to an earlier manifest if needed.
deploy.functionVersionsHint: Rollback a script function to a previous deploy version.
deploy.bundleObjectsHint: Create missing objects from the active bundle, update all artifacts to match the manifest, or remove bundle tree objects (application node and deploy history are kept). Migrations are not re-run.
deploy.bundleObjectsCreateConfirm: Create missing bundle objects from the active manifest?
deploy.bundleObjectsUpdateConfirm: Update all bundle objects to match the active manifest?
deploy.bundleObjectsDeleteConfirm: Remove all bundle objects from the tree? The application node and deploy history will be kept.
deploy.eventCatalogHint: Events declared in the active bundle manifest (FW-31). Used for operator WebSocket subscribe_events role checks.
deploy.eventCatalogEmpty: No events in catalog. Deploy a bundle with events[] or use GET /api/v1/applications/{{appId}}/events.
bundle.title: Bundle manifest
bundle.subtitle: Export, edit, validate, and deploy JSON manifest for {{appId}}.
bundle.noDeployYet: No bundle deployed yet. Edit the template below, import a JSON file, or pull objects from the tree — then Validate and Deploy.
bundle.importInvalid: Invalid JSON file. Choose a valid bundle manifest.
bundle.pullEmptyHint: No objects found in app visual groups. Add dashboards/devices under this app first, or use Pull path below for a specific tree node.
bundle.deployConfirm: Deploy edited manifest to the platform?
bundle.sectionsHint: Remove items from the manifest JSON before deploy. Use Sync below to apply tree changes.
bundle.pullPathHint: Import one tree object (dashboard, workflow, device, …) into the manifest JSON.
bundle.license.title: Commercial bundle license
bundle.license.hint: Paid bundles include a signed license block bound to this installation ID. Give the ID to the vendor or use marketplace activation — do not edit manifest after signing.
bundle.license.loadError: Could not load platform license status
bundle.license.manifestPresent: Present — will be verified on deploy
bundle.license.mismatchInstallation: License installationId ({{licensed}}) does not match this server ({{server}}). Request a new signature from the vendor.
bundle.license.errorHint.title: Hint:
bundle.license.errorHint.installationId: The bundle was signed for another installation. Copy Installation ID above and request a new license or use marketplace activation.
bundle.license.errorHint.contentSha256: Manifest was changed after signing. Re-sign the bundle or deploy the original JSON unchanged.
bundle.license.errorHint.expired: License expired — contact the vendor for renewal.
bundle.license.errorHint.signature: Invalid signature or missing ISPF_LICENSE_PUBLIC_KEY_PEM on the server.
bundle.license.errorHint.requireSigned: Server requires signed bundles (ISPF_LICENSE_REQUIRE_SIGNED_BUNDLES). Add a valid license block or use a free/reference bundle.
bundle.license.errorHint.generic: See docs/en/commercial-licensing.md or System → Metrics for installation ID.
treeExport.title: Subtree JSON export/import
treeExport.subtitle: Export or import nodes under {{rootPath}} (formatVersion 1). Federation proxies are skipped on import.
lifecycle.title: Application lifecycle
lifecycle.subtitle: SQL schema, bindings, reports, and script functions via application API.
lifecycle.bindingsEmpty: No bindings registered for this application.
lifecycle.reportsEmpty: No reports registered for this application.
